list.name: Changes
list.comment: scripts: move scripts into build/scripts and fixup argument processing of build.sh and reformat.sh

project.component: { "keyToString": { "CMake Application.CLI11-generate-single-file.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.RadMigrateCodeStyle": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "RunOnceActivity.west.config.association.type.startup.service": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "SHELLCHECK.PATH": "I do mind", "Shell Script.Build (Debug).executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Build.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Cleanup.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Open Shell.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Push To Device.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Reformat And Push Code.executor": "Run", "Shell Script.Reformat Code.executor": "Run", "bazel.project.detector.is.bazel.project": "true", "cf.advertisement.text.overridden": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "deletionFromPopupRequiresConfirmation": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "last_opened_file_path": "/home/yzbruh/IdeaProjects/pmt-renovated/reformat.sh", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: build/scripts/reformat.sh && git add . && git commit -m "pmt: reformat code" && proxychains git push

task.summary: Default task
build.sh: Gift two threads to the user...
pmt: Introduce, fixup - Fix pstderr file pointer. - Improve and add more functions on libpartition_map. - Improve functions.
pmt: Minor changes. - Add build instruction. - Improve function lambdas.
pmt: Improve libpartition_map - Add new operators to Map_t and builder. - Some improvements.
pmt: Improve pmt & libpartition_map - Change some operator returnn types. - Use std::map instead of std::unordered on magic number maps. - Some improvements.

pmt: Improve libpartition_map and tests - Change doFor*** function return types as bool. - Add catching of doFor*** function test results. - Use std::ios_base_failure for catch std::fstream errors on tests
pmt: Improve libraries - Tests have been improved. - Some functions and classes in libhelper have been improved for better results.
pmt: Add documentation to libhelper functions, etc.
pmt: reformat code, etc.
pmt: add control for -l flag
pmt: Last commit for 1.2.0 version - Major changes for developers. - Some changes to flash and sizeof functions. - Some minor changes.
pmt: fix workflow
pmt: start working on 1.3.0 - Add log cleaner function. - Introduce function flag structure. - Some improvements.
pmt: remove non-signal exit code catching.
pmt: add [] operators to Map_t and builder
pmt: Improve libpartition_map types and some functions. - Add new operators to Map_t. - Add new flags to info function. - Move some local pmt function(s) to libhelper. - Etc...
pmt: Improve libhelper and libpartition_map, etc.
pmt: Fixup backup function
pmt: update latest release date
pmt: reformat code and improve workflow
pmt: fixup manager.sh
pmt: improve libhelper, etc.
pmt: add stdin parsing support, etc.
pmt: add random number generator class (compile-time, with templates)
pmt: cleanup PureTuple class.
pmt: improve PureTuple class.
pmt: improve PureTuple class and improve function manager.
pmt: reformat code, etc.
pmt: Add new type (class) to libhelper, etc. - Add Helper::Capsule. - Fix some compilation errors.
pmt: Improve libhelper, etc.
pmt: Improve libpartition_map, etc.
pmt: continue working. - Improve libhelper's android functions.
github: fixup workflow - Use `cp src/plugins/*plugin.so` instead of `cp src/*plugin.so`.
build.sh: Improve argument processing and add new flags (to make architectural selection easier).
libcrypto: Instead of using the prebuilt libcrypto, compile from source. - Add new CMake functions (functions.cmake).
pmt: start working on 1.7.0
build.sh: Stop embroidering -G* flags
scripts: move scripts into build/scripts and fixup argument processing of build.sh and reformat.sh

MESSAGE.value: pmt: remove non-signal exit code catching.
pmt: add [] operators to Map_t and builder
pmt: Improve libpartition_map types and some functions. - Add new operators to Map_t. - Add new flags to info function. - Move some local pmt function(s) to libhelper. - Etc...
pmt: Improve libhelper and libpartition_map, etc.
pmt: Fixup backup function
pmt: update latest release date
pmt: reformat code and improve workflow
pmt: fixup manager.sh
pmt: improve libhelper, etc.
pmt: add stdin parsing support, etc.
pmt: add random number generator class (compile-time, with templates)
pmt: cleanup PureTuple class.
pmt: improve PureTuple class.
pmt: improve PureTuple class and improve function manager.
pmt: reformat code, etc.
pmt: Add new type (class) to libhelper, etc. - Add Helper::Capsule. - Fix some compilation errors.
pmt: Improve libhelper, etc.
pmt: Improve libpartition_map, etc.
pmt: continue working. - Improve libhelper's android functions.
github: fixup workflow - Use `cp src/plugins/*plugin.so` instead of `cp src/*plugin.so`.
build.sh: Improve argument processing and add new flags (to make architectural selection easier).
libcrypto: Instead of using the prebuilt libcrypto, compile from source. - Add new CMake functions (functions.cmake).
pmt: start working on 1.7.0
build.sh: Stop embroidering -G* flags
scripts: move scripts into build/scripts and fixup argument processing of build.sh and reformat.sh

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: scripts: move scripts into build/scripts and fixup argument processing of build.sh and reformat.sh
